title: Master v0.5.6 Tester Publish Approved Submission Fallback
notes:
Changes:
- If shared-dev/database.json is empty/missing, Master falls back to the latest approved/merged submission.
- Extracts item data from that approved submission.
- Repairs shared-dev/database.json from the approved submission items.
- Prepares/publishes the Tester small update using the confirmed item count.
- Shows source as approved-submission-fallback when fallback is used.
- Keeps Tester safety flags: appReplacement false, requiresExe false, keepsTesterUpdateTab true.
